decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id ('project_14th-street-transit-truck-priority-pilot') is already the closest-matching registry record. The payload aligns on project_name ('14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project'), project_type ('pilot'), borough ('Manhattan'), and description. The slight status difference ('implemented October 2019' in the observation vs 'ongoing' in the registry) reflects a document-time snapshot, not a distinct identity. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that id.
